title: Intrinsic timescales and predictive allostatic interoception in brain health and disease.

assets.abstract: The cognitive neuroscience of brain diseases faces challenges in understanding the complex relationship between brain structure and function, the heterogeneity of brain phenotypes, and the lack of dimensional and transnosological explanations. This perspective offers a framework combining the predictive coding theory of allostatic interoceptive overload (PAIO) and the intrinsic neural timescales (INT) theory to provide a more dynamic understanding of brain health in psychiatry and neurology. PAI

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
